requirement_topic.en: Ecodesign Requirements — Space Heaters and Combination Heaters — Germany / EU
requirement_topic.zh: 生态设计要求——空间供暖设备与组合供暖设备——德国/欧盟
requirement_topic.zht: 生態設計要求——空間供暖設備與組合供暖設備——德國/歐盟

summary.en: Ecodesign Regulation (EU) 2016/2281 (implementing Ecodesign Directive 2009/125/EC, superseding 813/2013 for air heating products including heat pumps) sets minimum seasonal space heating energy efficiency (ηs) thresholds. For heat pumps, efficiency is expressed via SCOP (seasonal coefficient of performance). Testing at rated conditions uses EN 14511; seasonal performance calculation uses EN 14825. Germany applies these EU Ecodesign requirements directly as an EU member state. Additionally, Germany's Gebäudeenergiegesetz (GEG — Building Energy Act) sets minimum heating system efficiency requirements for new and existing buildings at the point of installation, which may exceed EU Ecodesign product thresholds. BAFA/KfW BEG subsidy programmes impose further minimum SCOP criteria above the Ecodesign legal floor for subsidy eligibility.
summary.zh: 生态设计法规（EU）2016/2281（实施生态设计指令2009/125/EC，对供暖产品包括热泵取代813/2013）为空间供暖设备设定了最低季节性空间供暖能效（ηs）门槛。对于热泵，效率通过SCOP（季节性性能系数）表示。额定工况下的测试依据EN 14511；季节性性能计算依据EN 14825。德国作为欧盟成员国直接适用上述欧盟生态设计要求。此外，德国《建筑能源法》（GEG）在安装阶段为新建和现有建筑的供暖系统设定了最低效率要求，该要求可能高于欧盟生态设计产品门槛。BAFA/KfW BEG补贴项目在生态设计法定门槛之上另行规定了更高的最低SCOP标准，作为补贴资格条件。
summary.zht: 生態設計法規（EU）2016/2281（實施生態設計指令2009/125/EC，對供暖產品包括熱泵取代813/2013）為空間供暖設備設定了最低季節性空間供暖能效（ηs）門檻。對於熱泵，效率通過SCOP（季節性性能係數）表示。額定工況下的測試依據EN 14511；季節性性能計算依據EN 14825。德國作為歐盟成員國直接適用上述歐盟生態設計要求。此外，德國《建築能源法》（GEG）在安裝階段為新建和現有建築的供暖系統設定了最低效率要求，該要求可能高於歐盟生態設計產品門檻。BAFA/KfW BEG補貼項目在生態設計法定門檻之上另行規定了更高的最低SCOP標準，作為補貼資格條件。

standards_or_laws: BEG subsidy programme (BAFA/KfW SCOP eligibility criteria)

summary.en: GB 21455-2019 is the mandatory energy efficiency standard for room air conditioners and multi-split systems, specifying COP at rated conditions. For dedicated space-heating heat pumps, GB/T 25127-2010 series covers low-ambient heating performance. Neither standard employs the SCOP methodology used in EU Ecodesign, and seasonal efficiency calculation methods are not equivalent. China has no equivalent to GEG building energy obligations or BAFA/KfW subsidy SCOP thresholds.
summary.zh: GB 21455-2019是房间空调器和多联机的强制性能效标准，规定额定工况下的COP。针对专用空间供暖热泵，GB/T 25127-2010系列涵盖低环境温度制热性能。这两项标准均未采用欧盟生态设计所用的SCOP方法，季节性效率计算方法不等效。中国没有等同于GEG建筑能源义务或BAFA/KfW补贴SCOP门槛的规定。
summary.zht: GB 21455-2019是房間空調器和多聯機的強制性能效標準，規定額定工況下的COP。針對專用空間供暖熱泵，GB/T 25127-2010系列涵蓋低環境溫度制熱性能。這兩項標準均未採用歐盟生態設計所用的SCOP方法，季節性效率計算方法不等效。中國沒有等同於GEG建築能源義務或BAFA/KfW補貼SCOP門檻的規定。

gap.en: No SCOP methodology equivalent in Chinese standards. Chinese efficiency test data (COP at rated condition) cannot be directly used to demonstrate compliance with EU Ecodesign ηs thresholds. Full re-testing to EN 14511 and seasonal performance calculation to EN 14825 is required. Germany adds two additional efficiency layers beyond EU Ecodesign: (1) GEG minimum heating efficiency requirements at building installation stage; (2) BAFA/KfW BEG subsidy programme minimum SCOP thresholds, which are higher than the EU Ecodesign legal floor and are de-facto market requirements given Germany's strong subsidy take-up.
gap.zh: 中国标准中没有等效的SCOP方法。中国效率测试数据（额定工况COP）不能直接用于证明符合欧盟生态设计ηs门槛。需按EN 14511重新进行全面测试，并按EN 14825计算季节性性能。德国在欧盟生态设计之上叠加两项额外效率要求：（1）GEG建筑安装阶段最低供暖效率要求；（2）BAFA/KfW BEG补贴项目最低SCOP门槛，该门槛高于欧盟生态设计法定下限，鉴于德国补贴申请量大，实为事实上的市场要求。
gap.zht: 中國標準中沒有等效的SCOP方法。中國效率測試數據（額定工況COP）不能直接用於證明符合歐盟生態設計ηs門檻。需按EN 14511重新進行全面測試，並按EN 14825計算季節性性能。德國在歐盟生態設計之上疊加兩項額外效率要求：（1）GEG建築安裝階段最低供暖效率要求；（2）BAFA/KfW BEG補貼項目最低SCOP門檻，該門檻高於歐盟生態設計法定下限，鑒於德國補貼申請量大，實為事實上的市場要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU Ecodesign + GEG at installation stage; BAFA/KfW BEG SCOP criteria are de-facto market requirement for competitive entry in Germany)

source.publisher: BAFA — Bundesamt für Wirtschaft und Ausfuhrkontrolle

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — no SCOP equivalent in Chinese standards; re-testing to EN 14511 and EN 14825 required; Germany additionally applies GEG building-energy requirements and BAFA/KfW BEG SCOP thresholds above the EU Ecodesign floor.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——中国标准中无等效SCOP；需按EN 14511和EN 14825重新测试；德国还在欧盟生态设计门槛之上叠加GEG建筑能源要求和BAFA/KfW BEG SCOP门槛。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——中國標準中無等效SCOP；需按EN 14511和EN 14825重新測試；德國還在歐盟生態設計門檻之上疊加GEG建築能源要求和BAFA/KfW BEG SCOP門檻。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling — Heat Pumps (Regulation (EU) No 811/2013) — Germany / EU
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标签——热泵（欧盟法规第811/2013号）——德国/欧盟
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標籤——熱泵（歐盟法規第811/2013號）——德國/歐盟

summary.en: Energy Labelling Regulation (EU) 811/2013 (delegated act under Regulation 2017/1369) requires an A+++ to G energy efficiency scale for space heaters. Heat pumps must display a seasonal efficiency class on a mandatory EU energy label on the product and in the product fiche. A temperature-dependent label format applies for heat pumps reflecting heating output at different outdoor temperatures. Germany applies this EU energy labelling requirement directly; BAFA uses the EU energy label class as one criterion in BEG subsidy eligibility assessments.
summary.zh: 能效标签法规（EU）811/2013（依据法规2017/1369的授权法案）要求空间供暖设备采用A+++至G能效等级。热泵须在产品及产品信息单上粘贴强制性欧盟能效标签，显示季节性效率等级。热泵适用与室外温度相关的温度依赖型标签格式。德国直接适用欧盟能效标签要求；BAFA将欧盟能效标签等级作为BEG补贴资格评估标准之一。
summary.zht: 能效標籤法規（EU）811/2013（依據法規2017/1369的授權法案）要求空間供暖設備採用A+++至G能效等級。熱泵須在產品及產品資訊單上粘貼強制性歐盟能效標籤，顯示季節性效率等級。熱泵適用與室外溫度相關的溫度依賴型標籤格式。德國直接適用歐盟能效標籤要求；BAFA將歐盟能效標籤等級作為BEG補貼資格評估標準之一。

standards_or_laws: BEG subsidy programme (BAFA — energy label class as subsidy criterion)

summary.en: China's energy efficiency labelling is governed by the GB 12021 series and the MIIT/SAMR energy label scheme. The Chinese label format, efficiency tier definitions, and rating methodology differ from the EU energy label. Chinese energy labels are not recognised in the EU/German market and cannot substitute the required EU label.
summary.zh: 中国能效标签由GB 12021系列及工信部/市监总局能效标识制度管理。中国标签格式、效率等级定义及评级方法与欧盟能效标签不同。中国能效标识在欧盟/德国市场不被认可，不能替代欧盟要求的标签。
summary.zht: 中國能效標籤由GB 12021系列及工信部/市監總局能效標識制度管理。中國標籤格式、效率等級定義及評級方法與歐盟能效標籤不同。中國能效標識在歐盟/德國市場不被認可，不能替代歐盟要求的標籤。

gap.en: A new EU energy label complying with Regulation (EU) 811/2013 is required. Seasonal efficiency must be re-calculated using EN 14825 methodology. Chinese energy label data cannot be directly transposed. In Germany, the EU energy label class additionally feeds into BAFA/KfW BEG subsidy eligibility — achieving a minimum label class (typically A++ or higher) is a de-facto commercial requirement to access government incentives in the world's largest residential heat-pump market.
gap.zh: 需要符合欧盟法规811/2013的新欧盟能效标签。季节性效率须按EN 14825方法重新计算。中国能效标签数据不能直接转换使用。在德国，欧盟能效标签等级还纳入BAFA/KfW BEG补贴资格评估——在全球最大住宅热泵市场，达到最低标签等级（通常为A++或以上）是获取政府激励措施的事实商业要求。
gap.zht: 需要符合歐盟法規811/2013的新歐盟能效標籤。季節性效率須按EN 14825方法重新計算。中國能效標籤數據不能直接轉換使用。在德國，歐盟能效標籤等級還納入BAFA/KfW BEG補貼資格評估——在全球最大住宅熱泵市場，達到最低標籤等級（通常為A++或以上）是獲取政府激勵措施的事實商業要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU energy label required before market placement; BAFA/KfW BEG subsidy uses label class as eligibility criterion — de-facto commercial requirement in Germany)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (Chinese energy label under GB 12021 series)

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — new EU energy label required; Chinese label not accepted; seasonal efficiency must be recalculated to EN 14825; in Germany, EU energy label class additionally determines BAFA/KfW BEG subsidy eligibility.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——需要新的欧盟能效标签；中国标签不被接受；季节性效率须按EN 14825重新计算；在德国，欧盟能效标签等级还决定BAFA/KfW BEG补贴资格。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——需要新的歐盟能效標籤；中國標籤不被接受；季節性效率須按EN 14825重新計算；在德國，歐盟能效標籤等級還決定BAFA/KfW BEG補貼資格。
